title: Ephemerum cristatum
intro: Ephemerum cristatum, also known as Crested Ephemerum, is a species of moss in the family Ephemeraceae, characterized by its unique, hair-like fronds and ability to grow in damp, shaded environments. The health benefits of Ephemerum cristatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ephemerum cristatum include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
